title: Polish operator copy
problem: Make the operator-facing intent intake copy better and easier to scan.
constraints: Protostar authority is limited to the examples/intents/greenfield fixture surface; do not change execution, review, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop if admission reports ambiguity above 0.20 or if policy flags fixture authority outside examples/intents/greenfield.

toolPermissions.reason: Verify the deterministic intent admission fixture path.

expectedBlockReasons: manual acceptance criterion has no justification
ambiguity score must exceed the 0.20 admission ceiling
